title: Mount Everest
text: Mount Everest is Earth's highest mountain above sea level, located in the Himalayas. Its elevation is 8,849 metres.

title: Nile
text: The Nile is a major north-flowing river in northeastern Africa. It is often considered the longest river in the world.

title: Inception (film)
text: Inception is a 2010 science fiction film written and directed by Christopher Nolan.

title: Christopher Nolan
text: Christopher Nolan is a British-American filmmaker. He was born in London, England in 1970.

title: The Dark Knight
text: The Dark Knight is a 2008 superhero film directed by Christopher Nolan and based on the DC character Batman.

title: Python (programming language)
text: Python is a high-level programming language created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991.

title: Guido van Rossum
text: Guido van Rossum is a Dutch programmer best known as the creator of the Python programming language.

title: Great Wall of China
text: The Great Wall of China is a series of fortifications built across the historical northern borders of ancient Chinese states.

title: Eiffel Tower
text: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower located on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. It was completed in 1889.

title: Tokyo
text: Tokyo is the capital and most populous city of Japan, located on the island of Honshu.

title: Zorblax Protocol
text: The Zorblax Protocol is a data synchronization standard invented by Elena Marsh in 2021. It was first deployed in the city of Veridia.
